CustomField.description: If linked to an AiD, this field pulls in the Department of the User who is the owner of the Deal. Otherwise, this field pulls in the value from Marketing / Trading on related Asset.
CustomField.formula: IF( pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.LOI_Date__c = Null || pro_Asset_in_Deal__c = Null, TEXT(pro_Asset__r.pro_Marketing_Trading__c), IF( pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Department != Null, pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.Department, pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.FirstName + ' ' + pro_Asset_in_Deal__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__r.leaseworks__Marketing_Representative_User__r.LastName + ' - No Department Defined'))
CustomField.label: Marketing / Trading
